title: Cheeky Cat Mod
description: Adds a rarely spawning cheeky cat.
body:
Cheeky Cat Mod is a simple mod that adds a rarely spawning cheeky cat.

Adds:
- cheeky cat mob,
- EVIL cheeky cat bossfight,
- cheeky dweller underground.

Made for twitch streamer [cheekycatdude](https://www.twitch.tv/cheekycatdude)

Credit to him for letting me use his character ^^^^
![Screenshot of a cheeky cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0cdd6d739ec5311b135d74335394e1789da771d_0.webp)
REQUIRES GECKOLIB
